zh-tw.editorNote: 端午前夕考生群組分享，配粽子照超應景
variations: 也可以接：「真正能上榜的不是粽子，是你願不願意拆開講義」
對上班族版本：「我吃了十顆，唯一包中的是這個月的健保費」

en.content:
A student asks: "Why do we have to eat zongzi for Dragon Boat Festival?"
Me: "Because 'wrapping zongzi' sounds like 'guaranteed to pass' in Mandarin."
Him: "So if I eat a bunch, am I set?"
Me: "No, that just guarantees one thing — a trip to the gastroenterologist."
en.editorNote: Share in student chats right before the festival, paired with a zongzi photo
variations: Add: "What actually gets you the passing grade isn't zongzi — it's whether you open the textbook."
Office version: "I ate ten. The only thing they guaranteed was this month's medical bill."

items.sourceNote: 夏天 珍奶 冰塊 厭世 — 2026 original

zh-tw.content:
夏天點珍奶，店員問：「正常冰還是少冰？」
我：「正常冰。」
店員：「那糖呢？」
我：「正常糖。」
店員：「哇，現在很少人點正常的了。」
我：「在生活裡我已經不正常很久，至少這杯讓我假裝一下。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 夏天午後厭世限動配珍奶照，自嘲日常
variations: 也可以接：「正常冰會融，正常糖會膩，只有不正常的生活很持久」
對減肥版本：「我點半糖去冰，是對自己僅存的一點底線」

en.content:
Ordering bubble tea in summer, the clerk asks: "Regular ice or less ice?"
Me: "Regular."
Clerk: "And sugar?"
Me: "Regular."
Clerk: "Wow, barely anyone orders everything regular these days."
Me: "My life stopped being regular ages ago. At least this cup lets me pretend."
en.editorNote: Hot-afternoon burnout caption with a bubble tea photo
variations: Add: "Regular ice melts, regular sugar gets sickly — only an irregular life really lasts."
Diet version: "I order half sugar, no ice. It's the last shred of a boundary I have left."

items.sourceNote: 諧音 西瓜 夏天 冷笑話 — 2026 延伸

zh-tw.content:
朋友：「夏天吃什麼水果最忠心？」
我：「西瓜。」
朋友：「為什麼？」
我：「因為它『甘願』被你切兩半 — 而且還是『心』給你的那一半。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 夏天切西瓜限動配照，無聊到好笑的冷諧音
variations: 也可以接：「它的紅心都給你了，你前任做不到吧」
對告白版本：「我對你就像西瓜 — 表面冷靜，裡面整顆都是紅的」

en.content:
Friend: "What's the most loyal fruit to eat in summer?"
Me: "Watermelon."
Friend: "Why?"
Me: "Because it lets you cut it in half without complaint — and gives you the half with its heart in it."
en.editorNote: Summer watermelon photo caption — a groaner of a pun
variations: Add: "It hands you its whole red heart. Your ex couldn't pull that off."
Confession version: "I'm like a watermelon to you — cool on the outside, completely red inside."

items.sourceNote: 夜市 冰品 排隊 夏天 厭世 — 2026 original

zh-tw.content:
夏天的夜市冰店為什麼永遠在排隊？

因為大家想吃的不是冰，
是那短短三分鐘 —
站在攤前，假裝自己人生唯一的煩惱，
只是要不要加煉乳。
zh-tw.editorNote: 夏夜逛夜市限動配剉冰照，療癒又厭世
variations: 也可以接：「那一勺煉乳是我整個禮拜唯一能下的決定」
對上班族版本：「冰會化，煩惱不會，但至少這三分鐘它們公平地一起融」

en.content:
Why is the night market shaved ice stall always in line during summer?

Because people aren't really there for the ice —
they're there for those three short minutes,
standing at the stall, pretending the only worry in their life
is whether to add condensed milk.
en.editorNote: Summer-night market caption with a shaved ice photo — comforting yet weary
variations: Add: "That spoonful of condensed milk is the only decision I got to make all week."
Office version: "Ice melts, worries don't — but for those three minutes, at least they melt together fairly."

items.sourceNote: 外國朋友 夜市 銅板美食 殺價 對話 — 2026 trend

zh-tw.content:
外國朋友逛夜市，看到一攤寫「銅板美食」。
他：「銅板是免費的意思嗎？」
我：「不是，是『很便宜』。」
他：「那為什麼我這碗要 120 元？」
我：「因為那是『銅板加通膨』，2026 年的銅板比較大顆。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 帶外國朋友逛夜市時用，自嘲物價上漲
variations: 也可以接：「以前一個銅板，現在要一疊銅板」
對在地版本：「銅板美食的銅板，現在是悠遊卡逼下去的那種」

en.content:
A foreign friend at the night market spots a sign: "copper-coin eats."
Him: "Does copper coin mean it's free?"
Me: "No, it means 'really cheap.'"
Him: "Then why is this bowl 120 NT?"
Me: "That's copper coin plus inflation. In 2026 the coins are bigger."
en.editorNote: Use when showing foreign friends around a night market — self-deprecating take on rising prices
variations: Add: "Used to be one coin. Now it's a whole stack of them."
Local version: "The 'copper coin' in copper-coin eats is now the beep of an EasyCard tap."

items.sourceNote: 2026 端午節 6/19 連假 粽子 南北戰爭 厭世 — 應景 original

zh-tw.content:
端午節最累的不是包粽子，
是要在群組裡決定中午吃誰家的。

南部粽說自己最正統，
北部粽說自己最有層次，
結果最後大家一起吃 —
超商微波的那顆。
zh-tw.editorNote: 端午連假前在家族群組發，配超商粽子照終結南北戰爭
variations: 也可以接：「真正的和平，是大家都餓到沒力氣吵」
對上班族版本：「連假在加班的我，吃的是辦公室冰箱裡那顆無黨無派的粽」

en.content:
The hardest part of Dragon Boat Festival isn't wrapping zongzi —
it's deciding in the group chat whose to eat for lunch.

Southern zongzi claims it's the most authentic.
Northern zongzi claims it has the most layers.
In the end everyone eats the same thing —
the one microwaved at the convenience store.
en.editorNote: Post in the family chat before the festival long weekend, with a convenience store zongzi photo, to end the north-south war
variations: Add: "True peace is when everyone's too hungry to argue anymore."
Office version: "Stuck working the holiday, I ate the one nonpartisan zongzi left in the office fridge."

items.sourceNote: 2026 流行語 含機量 AI 摸魚 結合食物 — trend

zh-tw.content:
同事：「你這餐的含機量很高耶。」
我：「什麼意思？」
同事：「菜是 AI 推薦的、外送是 AI 派的、連你吃完那句『好飽』都是它幫你打的。」
我：「那我吃的是什麼？」
同事：「你只負責出胃。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 搭配 2026 流行語「含機量」，外送限動配文很有梗
variations: 也可以接：「我這頓飯唯一純人工的部分，是付錢時的心痛」
對減肥版本：「AI 算了卡路里，我假裝沒看到 — 這部分還是純手動」

en.content:
Coworker: "Your meal has a really high AI-content level."
Me: "What do you mean?"
Coworker: "The dish was AI-recommended, the delivery was AI-dispatched, even that 'so full' you just said was auto-typed for you."
Me: "Then what part is me?"
Coworker: "You just provide the stomach."
en.editorNote: Plays on 2026's 'AI-content level' slang — great caption for a delivery photo
variations: Add: "The only hand-made part of this meal was the heartbreak when I paid."
Diet version: "The AI counted the calories. I pretended not to see — that part's still manual."

items.sourceNote: 2026 馬年 馬倒成功 哭哭馬 喪萌 諧音 — 應景

zh-tw.content:
今年是馬年，飲料店推出新品「馬到成功茶」。
我點了一杯，喝完當天就被資遣。

回去客訴，老闆說：
「先生，你看清楚 — 是『馬倒成功』，馬都倒了，你還想成功什麼？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 馬年諧音梗，搭配喪萌「哭哭馬」風格限動配文
variations: 也可以接：「我又加點一杯『穩了茶』，結果連杯子都打翻」
對求職版本：「面試前喝『馬到成功』，面試後只剩『馬倒』」

en.content:
It's the Year of the Horse, so a drink shop launched a "Gallop to Success Tea."
I ordered one, and got laid off the same day.

When I went back to complain, the owner said:
"Sir, read it carefully — it's 'Horse Falls Over.' The horse already collapsed. What success were you expecting?"
en.editorNote: Year-of-the-Horse pun built on 2026's 'horse falls over' self-mocking meme — pair with a gloomy-cute story
variations: Add: "I ordered a 'Guaranteed Win Tea' next — and spilled the whole cup."
Job-hunting version: "Drank 'Gallop to Success' before the interview, left with only the 'falls over' part."

items.sourceNote: 六月 夏天 夜市 冰品 高溫 上班族 — 2026 應景 original

zh-tw.content:
六月的台灣有兩種人：
一種在冷氣房裡假裝在工作，
一種在芒果冰前面真的在認真。

我屬於第三種 —
人在冷氣房，心在芒果冰，
工作則在另一個平行宇宙。
zh-tw.editorNote: 六月高溫上班日限動配芒果冰照，厭世又消暑
variations: 也可以接：「我的生產力跟剉冰一樣，出冷氣房五分鐘就化光」
對加班版本：「老闆問我熱不熱，我說『心是冷的，外面很熱』」

en.content:
There are two kinds of people in Taiwan in June:
those pretending to work in the air conditioning,
and those genuinely focused — in front of a bowl of mango shaved ice.

I'm the third kind:
body in the AC, heart at the mango ice,
and my actual work in some parallel universe.
en.editorNote: Caption for a June-heat workday with a mango ice photo — weary and cooling
variations: Add: "My productivity is like shaved ice — five minutes out of the AC and it's gone."
Overtime version: "Boss asked if I was hot. I said, 'My heart's cold, it's the outside that's hot.'"

items.sourceNote: 高麗菜煮蛋那桌 爆紅迷因 食物外交 阿嬤 — 2026 trend 延伸

zh-tw.content:
外國朋友來家裡吃飯，被安排在阿嬤旁邊。
他小聲問我：「為什麼大家都搶坐這桌？」
我：「因為這是『高麗菜煮蛋那桌』 — 阿嬤最會夾菜的那一桌。」
他：「坐這桌有什麼好處？」
我：「沒有好處，只有夾不完的菜，跟拒絕不了的愛。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 搭配 2026 爆紅迷因「高麗菜煮蛋那桌」，家庭聚餐限動配阿嬤夾菜照
variations: 也可以接：「坐這桌的人，碗永遠是滿的，意志永遠是輸的」
對年夜飯版本：「全家最危險的位子，就是阿嬤手伸得到的範圍」

en.content:
A foreign friend came over for dinner and got seated next to Grandma.
He whispered: "Why is everyone fighting to sit at this table?"
Me: "Because this is 'the cabbage-and-egg table' — the one where Grandma reaches over to load your bowl."
Him: "What's the upside of sitting here?"
Me: "No upside. Just endless food piled on, and love you can't decline."
en.editorNote: Built on 2026's viral 'cabbage-and-egg table' meme — pair with a grandma-serving-food photo at a family dinner
variations: Add: "At this table your bowl is always full and your willpower is always losing."
Reunion dinner version: "The most dangerous seat in the family is anywhere within Grandma's reach."

items.sourceNote: 2026 端午 冰粽 楊枝甘露 香菜花生 創意口味 — 獵奇口味延伸

zh-tw.content:
今年端午的冰粽口味：榴槤、楊枝甘露、香菜花生。
朋友：「這還算粽子嗎？」
我：「不算，這算考驗。」
朋友：「考驗什麼？」
我：「考驗你跟老闆，誰先撐不住。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 端午節前後限動配冰粽照，自嘲現在的獵奇口味
variations: 也可以接：「以前包粽子是包餡，現在是包膽量」
對減肥版本：「冰粽消暑沒錯，但我的罪惡感也跟著冰鎮了」

en.content:
This year's ice zongzi flavors: durian, mango pomelo sago, cilantro-peanut.
Friend: "Does this even count as zongzi?"
Me: "No. It counts as a dare."
Friend: "A dare for what?"
Me: "A dare to see who cracks first — you or the owner."
en.editorNote: Dragon Boat Festival caption for chilled-zongzi photos — mock today's cursed flavors
variations: Add: "Wrapping zongzi used to be about the filling. Now it's about the nerve."
Diet version: "Ice zongzi cools you down, sure — but it also chills my guilt and serves it fresh."

items.sourceNote: 2026 爆紅流行語 超派 超派炸雞 台語超兇 — 諧音梗店名延伸

zh-tw.content:
經過一間炸雞店叫「超派」。
朋友：「為什麼這麼兇的名字？」
我：「老闆說 — 排隊很派、價格很派、辣度也很派。」
朋友：「那哪裡不派？」
我：「份量。份量很乖。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 搭配 2026 爆紅流行語「超派」，買炸雞限動配照片用
variations: 也可以接：「最派的其實是結帳那一刻」
對厭世版本：「老闆超派，我的錢包超軟」

en.content:
Passed a fried chicken joint called "Super Fierce."
Friend: "Why such an aggressive name?"
Me: "The owner says the line is fierce, the prices are fierce, the spice is fierce."
Friend: "So what isn't fierce?"
Me: "The portion. The portion is very polite."
en.editorNote: Riff on 2026's viral slang 'super fierce' — caption for fried chicken photos
variations: Add: "The fiercest part is actually the moment you pay."
Burnout version: "The owner's fierce, my wallet's soft."

items.sourceNote: 2026 夏季 西瓜烏龍 小玉西瓜 季節飲料回歸 — 上班族厭世 cross

zh-tw.content:
為什麼夏天一到，大家都在搶西瓜烏龍？

因為它一年只回來一次 —
比某些人的關心還準時。

而且它從不問你「最近過得好不好」，
它直接給你冰的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 夏季限定飲料開賣時 IG 限動配西瓜飲料照
variations: 也可以接：「季節限定的意思是 — 錯過就要再撐三百天」
對單身版本：「西瓜烏龍是我這個夏天唯一準時赴約的對象」

en.content:
Why does everyone scramble for watermelon oolong the second summer hits?

Because it only comes back once a year —
more punctual than some people's concern for you.

And it never asks "how have you been lately."
It just hands you something cold.
en.editorNote: Caption for seasonal-drink photos when the summer menu drops
variations: Add: "Limited-edition means: miss it and you wait three hundred more days."
Single version: "Watermelon oolong is the only one who showed up on time for me this summer."

items.sourceNote: 2026 端午 鹼粽 喝的粽子 飲料化 — 文化荒謬觀察 original

zh-tw.content:
今年端午連粽子都可以用喝的了。
阿嬤聽到差點昏倒：「粽子用喝的？那我包了一整天是包心酸的？」
我：「阿嬤，這叫進步。」
阿嬤：「進步是讓我不用包，不是讓粽子變成飲料。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 端午節限動配鹼粽飲料照，搭配長輩世代差異梗
variations: 也可以接：「下一步是不是連年夜飯都能用吸的」
對年輕人版本：「我們不是懶，是把雙手空出來滑手機」

en.content:
This year you can even drink your zongzi.
Grandma nearly fainted: "Drink the zongzi? Then what did I spend all day wrapping — heartbreak?"
Me: "Grandma, it's called progress."
Grandma: "Progress is sparing me the wrapping, not turning zongzi into a beverage."
en.editorNote: Dragon Boat Festival caption for drinkable-zongzi photos — generation-gap humor
variations: Add: "What's next, sipping the whole reunion dinner through a straw?"
Younger version: "We're not lazy — we're freeing up both hands to scroll our phones."

items.sourceNote: 經典食物諧音笑話 榴槤 流連忘返 蝦子作弊 — 改寫 original

zh-tw.content:
朋友：「哪種水果最容易讓人捨不得走？」
我：「榴槤。」
朋友：「為什麼？」
我：「因為吃完它的味道，會讓你『留連』整間房間三天 — 想走也走不掉。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 冷笑話場合用，面無表情念出來效果最好
variations: 也可以接：「真正留連忘返的是你電梯裡的鄰居」
延伸版：「最捨不得走的不是你，是榴槤的味道」

en.content:
Friend: "Which fruit makes it hardest to leave?"
Me: "Durian."
Friend: "Why?"
Me: "Because after you eat it, the smell lingers in the whole room for three days — you couldn't leave it behind even if you tried."
en.editorNote: Groan-worthy pun for cold-joke moments — deliver with a straight face
variations: Add: "The one who really can't escape it is your neighbor stuck in the elevator with you."
Extension: "It's not you who won't leave — it's the durian's smell."

items.sourceNote: 台灣諧音店名文化 — 餃子店包手包腳 延伸 改寫

zh-tw.content:
看到一間餃子店叫「包手包腳」。
朋友：「為什麼取這名字？」
我：「老闆說 — 來這裡吃，從手包到腳都會被餵飽。」
朋友：「那吃太飽呢？」
我：「那就換成『包紅包』 — 補錢給你的腰圍。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 聚餐前在群組分享，預告大家準備被餵到走不動
variations: 也可以接：「吃完發現包到的不是手腳，是我的胃跟錢包」
對減肥版本：「我的減肥計畫被它包起來，一起下水煮了」

en.content:
Saw a dumpling shop with a name that puns on "wrapping you up head to toe."
Friend: "Why call it that?"
Me: "The owner says you'll get stuffed from your hands all the way to your feet."
Friend: "And if you overeat?"
Me: "Then it switches to wrapping a red envelope — to make up for your waistline."
en.editorNote: Drop in the group chat before a big dinner — warn everyone they'll be fed immobile
variations: Add: "Turns out it didn't wrap my hands and feet — it wrapped my stomach and my wallet."
Diet version: "My diet plan got wrapped up and boiled along with the dumplings."

items.sourceNote: 2026 夏季 芒果季回歸 IKEA 5/21 芒果甜點 — 季節限定厭世 cross original

zh-tw.content:
為什麼一到夏天，全台灣都在排芒果冰？

因為芒果一年只甜這一次，
而我們的人生，一次都還在等。

至少冰化掉的速度，
比我的存款慢一點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 夏季芒果甜點開賣時 IG 限動配芒果冰照
variations: 也可以接：「芒果季結束就等於夏天的甜被沒收了」
對單身版本：「芒果冰是我這個夏天唯一捨得排隊等的對象」

en.content:
Why does all of Taiwan line up for mango shaved ice the moment summer arrives?

Because mango is only this sweet once a year —
and our lives are still waiting on the first time.

At least the ice melts
a little slower than my savings.
en.editorNote: Caption for mango dessert photos when the summer menu drops
variations: Add: "When mango season ends, summer's sweetness gets confiscated."
Single version: "Mango ice is the only thing I'll happily wait in line for this summer."

items.sourceNote: 寧夏夜市 綠豆沙 消暑飲品 — 上班族厭世 cross original

zh-tw.content:
夜市綠豆沙老闆：「要綿一點還是顆粒一點？」
我：「綿一點。」
老闆：「整杯都不能有顆粒喔？」
我：「對，今天的人生顆粒已經夠多了，嘴巴裡的就饒了我吧。」
老闆默默幫我多打十秒。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下班買消暑飲品 IG 限動配綠豆沙照，厭世系
variations: 也可以接：「他打的不是綠豆沙，是把我這週的稜角磨平」
對加班版本：「綿到沒有顆粒的那種，跟我被磨掉的脾氣一樣」

en.content:
Night market mung bean smoothie vendor: "Smooth or a bit chunky?"
Me: "Smooth."
Vendor: "No chunks at all?"
Me: "None. My life's already got enough lumps today — spare my mouth."
The vendor quietly blended it ten seconds longer.
en.editorNote: After-work cool-down drink caption with a mung bean smoothie photo — burnout vibes
variations: Add: "He wasn't blending the smoothie — he was smoothing out my week's rough edges."
Overtime version: "Lump-free smooth, just like the temper that got ground out of me."

items.sourceNote: 台灣諧音招牌文化 — 鮭山島 鮭魚壽司店名 改寫 original

zh-tw.content:
朋友：「為什麼那家壽司店叫『鮭山島』？」
我：「因為它把整座島的鮭魚都搬上你的盤子。」
朋友：「那吃完呢？」
我：「吃完你就『歸心似箭』 — 心疼錢包，箭一般衝回家。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 冷笑話場合或壽司聚餐前分享，面無表情念最有效
variations: 也可以接：「真正歸的不是山，是我下個月的伙食費」
延伸版：「鮭魚回流是天性，我的錢回流是夢想」

en.content:
Friend: "Why is that sushi place named with a pun on 'salmon mountain island'?"
Me: "Because it piles a whole island's worth of salmon onto your plate."
Friend: "And after you eat?"
Me: "After, you bolt home like an arrow — heartbroken over your wallet."
en.editorNote: Share for cold-joke moments or before a sushi dinner — deliver with a straight face
variations: Add: "What really comes home isn't the salmon — it's the dent in next month's food budget."
Extension: "Salmon swimming home is instinct. My money swimming back is a fantasy."

items.sourceNote: 水果諧音冷笑話 木瓜怕怕 papaya — 2026 笑話大全參考改寫

zh-tw.content:
朋友：「哪一種水果最膽小？」
我：「木瓜。」
朋友：「為什麼？」
我：「因為它 papaya（怕呀）。」
朋友把我的木瓜牛奶倒掉了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 冷笑話場合或夜市喝木瓜牛奶時念，面無表情效果最好
variations: 也可以接：「最勇敢的是榴槤 — 因為它臭得理直氣壯」
延伸：「最有錢的是芒果 — 忙著賺錢的果」

en.content:
Friend: "Which fruit is the most scared?"
Me: "Papaya."
Friend: "Why?"
Me: "Because it's always going 'papa-yikes.'"
Friend poured out my papaya milk.
en.editorNote: Deliver at cold-joke moments with a straight face — works over a papaya milk at the night market
variations: Add: "The bravest is durian — it stinks with total confidence."
Extension: "The richest is cantaloupe — it's got that melon money."

items.sourceNote: impasta 假麵 諧音梗 — 2026 food puns 改寫

zh-tw.content:
為什麼那碗麵被退貨了？

因為老闆把義大利麵煮成了泡麵 —
它根本是個冒牌貨，
一條假掰的麵。
zh-tw.editorNote: 冷笑話場合或被踩雷餐廳吐槽時用，配麵照限動
variations: 也可以接：「真正的麵會吸湯，假的麵只會吸你的耐心」
延伸：「米其林假麵 — 看起來很高級，吃起來很塑膠」

en.content:
Why did that bowl of pasta get returned?

Because it turned out to be instant noodles in disguise —
a total fraud.
An impasta.
en.editorNote: Cold-joke fuel or for roasting a let-down restaurant — pair with a noodle photo
variations: Add: "Real noodles soak up the broth. Fake ones just soak up your patience."
Extension: "A Michelin impasta — looks fancy, tastes like plastic."

items.sourceNote: 披薩 誠實 不會欺騙 諧音梗 — 2026 改寫

zh-tw.content:
為什麼披薩是最誠實的食物？

因為它只切四片、六片、八片，
從來沒有七片 —
它從不「欺騙」你。

不像我前任。
zh-tw.editorNote: 失戀療傷或週末叫披薩時 IG 限動配披薩照
variations: 也可以接：「披薩唯一的謊言，是說『我吃兩片就好』的那個人」
對減肥版本：「披薩很誠實，騙人的是我的『最後一片』」

en.content:
Why is pizza the most honest food?

It only comes in four, six, or eight slices —
never seven.
It would never split you into an odd number of pieces.

Unlike my ex.
en.editorNote: Post-breakup comfort or weekend pizza-night caption with a pizza photo
variations: Add: "The only lie at pizza night is the person who says 'I'll just have two slices.'"
Diet version: "Pizza is honest. The liar is my idea of 'the last slice.'"

items.sourceNote: 起司 nacho cheese 不是你的 諧音梗 — 2026 snack puns 改寫

zh-tw.content:
同事打開冰箱：「這片起司是誰的？」
我：「不是你的。」
同事：「我問是誰的。」
我：「我說了 — 不是你的。」

他這才看懂：那片起司上貼著我的名字。
zh-tw.editorNote: 辦公室冰箱被偷吃時用，順便宣示主權，限動配起司照
variations: 也可以接：「公司冰箱的潛規則 — 沒貼名字的都是公糧」
延伸：「我的起司會消失，但我的怒氣不會」

en.content:
Coworker opens the fridge: "Whose cheese is this?"
Me: "Not yours."
Coworker: "I asked whose it is."
Me: "I told you — it's nacho cheese."

Then he saw it: my name was on the label.
en.editorNote: For office-fridge thieves — stake your claim, pair with a cheese photo
variations: Add: "Unwritten office rule — anything without a name on it is communal."
Extension: "My cheese may disappear, but my rage won't."

items.sourceNote: 咖啡 latte 諧音 a lot 上班族 厭世 — 2026 coffee puns 改寫

zh-tw.content:
店員：「拿鐵還是美式？」
我：「拿鐵。」
店員：「為什麼每次都拿鐵？」
我：「因為它的英文叫 latte，唸起來像『a lot』 — 我需要的東西很多，但至少一杯能到手。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 週一早上點咖啡時 IG 限動配咖啡杯照，自嘲一下
variations: 也可以接：「美式太苦，跟我的人生重疊度太高」
延伸：「我點的不是拿鐵，是『撐到中午』的處方箋」

en.content:
Barista: "Latte or Americano?"
Me: "Latte."
Barista: "Why always a latte?"
Me: "Because 'latte' sounds like 'a lot' — I need a lot of things, but at least this one I can actually get."
en.editorNote: Monday morning coffee-run caption with a cup photo — self-deprecating
variations: Add: "Americano's too bitter — overlaps too much with my life."
Extension: "I didn't order a latte, I ordered a prescription to survive till noon."

items.sourceNote: 麵食 impasta 冒牌貨 諧音 — 2026 food puns 改寫，台味重組

zh-tw.content:
朋友：「你煮的這碗到底是什麼麵？」
